mp11_summary: MP11 Base Case is an even-flow harvest projection over 300 years, net of 1.5% non-recoverable losses, and represents about 90% of adjusted LRSY.
mp11_numeric_anchor: Base Case `1,061,600 m3/year`; current AAC `1,362,000 m3/year`; reported decrease `22.1%`.
phase7_figure_evidence: Figure 2 and Figure 20 accepted for comparison.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 has a launch-smoked teaching runtime with generic managed CC harvest signals, but no accepted AAC-equivalent base-case calibration.
phase7_plus_followup: Use the MP11 base-case harvest level as a future calibration and QA target after source-layer, AU/yield, MHA, and constraint rebuilds are complete.
notes: Do not claim the Phase 5 teaching runtime reproduces this AAC forecast.

mp11_summary: MP11 evaluates maintaining current AAC for 10 years and maximizing short-term harvest with controlled mid-term effects.
mp11_numeric_anchor: Maintain-current-AAC long-term endpoint `1,055,200`; maximize-short-term first decade `1,147,700` and long-term endpoint `1,095,500` m3/year.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 includes a representative max-even-flow smoke mode, but it was a runtime-signal smoke rather than a reviewed MP11-style flow comparison.
phase7_plus_followup: Add explicit harvest-flow scenario definitions and QA metrics after MP11 model inputs are rebuilt.
notes: The existing runtime smoke proves capability, not MP11-equivalent behavior.

mp11_summary: MP11 is more sensitive to managed-stand yield changes than natural-stand yield changes; LiDAR/ITI/LEFI and reduced OAF1 produce the largest uplift.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 has reviewed VDYP/TIPSY curve surfaces, but no MP11-style sensitivity suite and no accepted LiDAR/ITI/LEFI input surface.
phase7_plus_followup: Build a public-data sensitivity suite and isolate WFP-only LiDAR/ITI/LEFI uplift as an unavailable or explicitly approximated scenario.
notes: The high-yield LiDAR/OAF1 scenario is evidence for scoping, not a public-data input.

mp11_summary: MP11 tests no genetic gain, full NSOG old-seral targets, MHA +/- 10 years, helicopter exclusion, and THLB +/- 10%.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 documents these as deferred or scenario-worthy concepts, not as implemented MP11-equivalent sensitivity runs.
phase7_plus_followup: Prioritize MHA, harvest-system exclusion, THLB adjustment, and genetic-gain sensitivities because their MP11 effects are numerically clear.
notes: These are candidate future scenario tests, not Phase 5 behavior claims.

mp11_summary: MP11 recommends a step-down LiDAR/ITI/LEFI/OAF1 scenario for the next 10 years after the base-case analysis.
mp11_numeric_anchor: AAC recommendation `1,252,700 m3/year`; uplift from Base Case `191,100 m3/year`; about `1.1%` below the scheduled MP10 decline benchmark.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 has no AAC-recommendation lane and must not be represented as a Chief-Forester-ready or WFP-model-equivalent forecast.
phase7_plus_followup: Treat the AAC recommendation as a high-level target for a future MP11-aligned scenario, gated on inventory/yield and flow-policy decisions.
notes: The recommendation depends on WFP inventory/model assumptions that are not fully public.

mp11_summary: MP11 reports base-case and AAC-recommendation THLB growing-stock trajectories split by <=120 and >120 year categories.
mp11_numeric_anchor: Base-case total THLB GS min/max `35,088,106`/`41,629,956`; AAC recommendation min/max `37,823,276`/`40,829,741` m3.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 exposes managed/unmanaged area and yield signals, but does not publish MP11-style THLB growing-stock KPI trajectories.
phase7_plus_followup: Add comparable growing-stock reports once MP11-aligned Patchworks outputs exist.
notes: Figure values are comparison evidence from recovered chart data, not model input.

mp11_summary: MP11 reports harvest-system, block-size, harvest-age, harvested-area, volume-per-ha, species-composition, and elevation-band behavior for base-case and AAC scenarios.
mp11_numeric_anchor: Base-case harvest-system average is 57% ground, 40% cable, and 3% helicopter; average block size is 19.1 ha; long-term harvested area averages 1,430 ha/year.
phase7_figure_evidence: Some KPI figures were inventoried or deferred; not all medium-priority KPI charts were extracted in Phase 7.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 explicitly defers ground/cable/heli assignment and carries harvest-system placeholders, so MP11 operational KPI comparison is mostly a future reporting gap.
phase7_plus_followup: Create public-data harvest-system proxies before attempting MP11-style operational KPI reports.
notes: Do not backfill stand-level harvest systems from aggregate MP11 percentages.

mp11_summary: MP11 reports age-class, cedar, old-cedar, and old-seral trajectories for base-case and AAC-recommendation scenarios.
mp11_numeric_anchor: Phase 7 reviewed age-class, cedar, and old-seral figures for planning only; they were not promoted to comparison-accepted status.
phase7_figure_evidence: Figures 6, 14, 15, 45, 51, 52, 16-19, and 53-56 reviewed for planning only.
phase5_comparison: Phase 5 carries cedar signals for teaching/reporting, but no hard cedar reserve, utility-pole-grade, or MP11 old-seral KPI calibration.
phase7_plus_followup: Use planning-only evidence to design reports and stronger validation checks before promoting these KPI families.
notes: Planning-only figure evidence should not be mixed with accepted comparison rows.
